archive_permits.title: Brunswick County Marina Operating License NC-MAR-2024-447

note.text: Standard county renewal. Certificate of occupancy and proof of insurance submitted. Issued 5/2.

archive_permits.title: Bermuda Department of Environment Marina License BDA-MAR-2024-21

note.text: International renewal — required notarized documents apostilled. Local agent handled submission. License renewed for 3 years through 2/28/2029.

archive_permits.title: Maine DEP Marine Fueling Facility Permit ME-MFF-882
archive_permits.display_name: Safe Harbor Kittery Point Yacht Yard

note.text: Long renewal cycle. Tank inspection (3/2), spill response plan update (3/15), state review (3/15-4/22). Renewal issued 4/28. Recommend starting 90 days earlier next cycle.

archive_permits.title: SCDHEC Septic System Operating Permit SC-OWTS-2025-1882

note.text: Septic pump-out and inspection completed 3/8 by Atlantic Septic. Required minor baffle replacement on tank 2. Renewal certificate received 4/24.

archive_permits.title: Ventura County Pool Operating Permit POOL-2024-V-3088

note.text: Annual pool inspection passed first time. Two minor items on the report (drain cover signage, chemical log binder) corrected before re-inspection. Permit good through 4/30/2027.
TWRA renewal delayed by state office backlog. Multiple follow-ups required. Compliance team escalated through regional director — license issued 4/14, retroactive to 1/15. No fines assessed.

archive_permits.title: USVI DPNR Coastal Zone Management Permit CZX-25-0117

note.text: Five-year coastal renewal. Required updated hurricane plan and dock condition report. Both submitted via local counsel. Permit issued 4/7.
DEC required updated bathymetric survey before renewal. Engaged Costello Marine for survey, completed 1/22. DEC approval received 3/30. New permit valid through 2/15/2031.

archive_permits.title: Town of Old Saybrook Mooring Field Permit 2026-OS-44

note.text: Renewed at March 18 town meeting after harbormaster review. Standard annual renewal — no changes. Fee paid same day.

archive_permits.title: EGLE Marina Sanitary Sewer Permit MI-2024-MS-118

note.text: Required full pump-out station inspection before renewal. Inspector visit completed 2/28; minor repair on pump 3 needed (replaced 3/4). Renewal certificate issued 3/10.
Routine NOI submitted online 1/12. Auto-approved 2/9. New 5-year coverage. SWPPP refreshed at the same time.

RIDEM approved renewal application after second round of comments. Updated SWPPP submitted with additional outfall monitoring. New permit valid through 12/31/2030. SWPPP binder updated at marina office.
